_readme: Trading logic defaults. Fields marked admin:true are also editable via the admin UI and stored in the database — the DB value takes precedence over these defaults when set.

vol_sizing._comment: Volatility-normalized sizing: size = (target_daily_vol_pct/100 × base_amount) / (ATR_14d_pct/100), scaled by conviction. Applies to paper trades and Alpaca notional.
vol_sizing._comment_cap: portfolio_cap_usd: maximum total open exposure across all symbols. null = no cap. When set, individual trade sizes are scaled down to fit within the remaining capacity.

continuous_entry._comment: Replaces the binary entry gate with a sigmoid curve. size_pct = min + (max - min) / (1 + exp(-steepness * (|score| - midpoint))). At |score|=midpoint the position is 50% of full size. Scores below skip_floor get 0% (skip entirely).
continuous_entry._comment_skip_floor: Absolute directional_score below this threshold skips the signal entirely (no entry, even at min_size). Prevents micro-signals from creating noise.
continuous_entry._comment_shrink_existing: When an existing position's score stays above keep_floor, shrink proportionally instead of closing. Below keep_floor, close entirely.

leverage._comment: ATR-based volatility caps. When 14-day ATR % exceeds high_vol_atr_pct the position is capped at 1x regardless of profile. Exceeding medium_vol_atr_pct caps at 2x. Conservative profile (inverse ETF) is unaffected.

trailing_stop._comment: When a HOLD signal fires on an open position, a trailing stop is set instead of forcing a market close. Stop = best_price_seen × (1 ± stop_loss_pct × tighten_factor). Updated every run while in trailing mode.

materiality_gate._comment_rolling: Dynamic per-symbol article baseline. Requires rolling_baseline_min_runs of history before activating; falls back to min_posts_delta until then.

technical_confidence._comment: Modifiers applied to confidence based on technical indicator alignment with signal direction. Each modifier is clamped to ±0.15 total. Positive = boost confidence, negative = reduce confidence.

signal_decay._comment: Exponential decay on directional_score based on hours since previous analysis. decay_factor = max(min_decay_factor, 0.5^(age/half_life)). Prevents stale news from sustaining positions.
signal_decay._comment_hold: Separate (slower) decay for positions already held. When enabled, existing positions use hold_half_lives instead of entry half-lives. Keeps positions open longer on stale-but-directionally-correct signals.

regime_adaptation._comment: Adjust entry thresholds based on market volatility. When max ATR across symbols exceeds high_vol_atr, multiply threshold by high_vol_mult (harder to enter in high vol). When max ATR is below low_vol_atr, multiply by low_vol_mult (easier in quiet markets).

conviction._comment_holding: Holding window in minutes. The position stays open at least this long before a HOLD signal can close it.
conviction._comment_reset: When a re-run confirms the same direction, reset (or extend) the holding window. Same/upgraded conviction resets to a full window; downgraded conviction shrinks the window. max_holding_minutes caps total hold time from original entry regardless of resets.
conviction._comment_expiry: What happens when the holding window expires.
conviction._comment_hold_signal: Whether a HOLD signal is blocked from closing a position while the window is still active. true = window protects the position.
conviction._comment_flip: Whether a direction flip (LONG->SHORT or vice versa) overrides the window and closes+reopens immediately.

crazy._comment: Overrides applied when risk_profile = 'crazy' (or used as a starting point for 'custom'). Each value replaces its top-level counterpart.
